test_environment.storage_backend: Local filesystem at C:/dev; Windows filesystem type unavailable because volume query returned Access denied

test_cases.description: Successful publication — all consumers receive artifact within SLA
test_cases.pass_criterion: Delivery confirmed for all consumers within 60s
test_cases.notes: In-memory registered consumer received artifact immediately.

test_cases.description: Publication decoupled from commit — publication failure does not trigger rollback
test_cases.expected_outcome: Artifact remains committed, no rollback triggered
test_cases.pass_criterion: Artifact retrievable from store after publication failure
test_cases.notes: Committed artifact remained retrievable after publication failure.

test_cases.description: Retry schedule — exponential backoff fires at correct intervals
test_cases.pass_criterion: All 5 retry timestamps match schedule within ±2s
test_cases.notes: Retry count exercised with zero-delay test schedule; required 0/5/25/125/600-second intervals were not measured.

test_cases.description: PUBLICATION_FAILED state — artifact queryable after exhausting all 5 retries
test_cases.trigger_condition: All 5 retry attempts exhausted with injected failures
test_cases.expected_outcome: Artifact enters PUBLICATION_FAILED state, queryable via engine
test_cases.pass_criterion: State is PUBLICATION_FAILED; all 5 sub-events logged on parent lineage record
test_cases.notes: Failure state query exercised, but test used one attempt and did not prove five logged attempts.

test_cases.description: Manual re-publication — PUBLICATION_FAILED artifact re-delivered on operator action
test_cases.trigger_condition: Operator triggers re-publication on PUBLICATION_FAILED artifact
test_cases.expected_outcome: Artifact delivered to consumer; original artifact_id and lineage chain preserved
test_cases.pass_criterion: Consumer receives artifact; no new artifact_id issued; lineage chain intact
test_cases.notes: Re-publication reused artifact_id and parent lineage reference.

test_cases.description: Idempotent delivery — duplicate delivery produces no duplicate consumer ingestion
test_cases.trigger_condition: Same artifact delivered twice to same consumer
test_cases.expected_outcome: Second delivery produces no duplicate ingestion at consumer
test_cases.pass_criterion: Consumer state identical before and after second delivery
test_cases.notes: Second delivery suppressed for same artifact-consumer key.

test_cases.description: Consumer isolation — one consumer unreachable does not delay others
test_cases.trigger_condition: One consumer made unreachable; remaining consumers available
test_cases.expected_outcome: Reachable consumers receive artifact within 60s without delay
test_cases.pass_criterion: Delivery to reachable consumers ≤60s; unreachable consumer enters retry cycle independently
test_cases.notes: Unavailable consumer did not block reachable consumer.

test_cases.description: Sub-event logging — every publication attempt logged on parent lineage record
test_cases.expected_outcome: Sub-event logged with attempt number, timestamp, consumer_id, outcome, failure_reason
test_cases.pass_criterion: Sub-event present on parent INGESTED lineage record and schema-valid
test_cases.notes: Append-only child publication event contains parent lineage reference and attempt metadata.

_additional_test_cases_note: Append any implementation-side test cases beyond the spec-defined set below. total_cases, passed, failed, skipped must reflect all cases including additions.
anomalies: Pytest full suite passed 45/45, but strict gate mapping identified spec cases not exercised at required production fidelity. Production target equivalence and Windows filesystem type are unverified. executed_by uses candidate harness actor ID; no durable production actor binding was available.
